FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Interface IImageCodec

Namespace
FluentGpu.Media
Assembly
FluentGpu.Media.dll

Portable decode seam (media-pipeline.md §3): turn encoded bytes (JPEG/PNG/WebP/…) into PREMULTIPLIED BGRA8 at a target size, constrained so a huge source never materializes full-res in CPU memory (WIC IWICBitmapScaler on Windows, CGImageSource on macOS). Implemented entirely on a worker thread; the leaf's COM/objc objects never cross the scheduler seam — only POD pixels do.

public interface IImageCodec

Methods

DecodeConstrained(ReadOnlySpan<byte>, int, int, Span<byte>, out int, out int)

Decode encoded into dstBgra8 (premultiplied, row-major, stride = w4) at targetW×targetH. dstBgra8 is at least targetWtargetH*4 bytes. Returns false (no throw) if the bytes are not a decodable image; the scheduler maps that to ImageFailureKind.Decode. Outputs the actual decoded dims (== target for the constrained path).

bool DecodeConstrained(ReadOnlySpan<byte> encoded, int targetW, int targetH, Span<byte> dstBgra8, out int w, out int h)

Parameters

encoded ReadOnlySpan<byte>
targetW int
targetH int
dstBgra8 Span<byte>
w int
h int

Returns

bool
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
